active_sales.name: Steam Summer Sale 2026
active_sales.note: This year's event runs June 25 - July 9, 2026 at 10am Pacific — today is the FINAL day, ideal for a last-chance urgency push on all PC/Steam keys.

active_sales.name: Loot.tn Top Promos (in-house)
active_sales.note: Google/Apple gift cards, Arc Raiders, and EA SPORTS FC 26 already discounted on-site 11-23%; can be amplified with countdown banners.

new_releases.title: EA SPORTS College Football 27
new_releases.platforms: PS5, Xbox Series X/S, PC (EA App, Steam, Epic)
new_releases.why_it_matters: EA SPORTS College Football 27 launches worldwide on July 9, 2026 and is the first entry in the series available on PC via EA App/Steam. Loot.tn's EA App key business (already selling F1 25) can pivot to feature this launch-day title.

new_releases.title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced
new_releases.why_it_matters: A major Ubisoft remake releasing this month, one of the few big AAA drops in an otherwise quiet July — good candidate for a featured key listing.

new_releases.title: Palworld 1.0
new_releases.why_it_matters: Full 1.0 launch of a title with a massive existing fanbase; high search intent around launch week.

new_releases.title: Halo: Campaign Evolved
new_releases.why_it_matters: Halo: Campaign Evolved is set to be released for PlayStation 5, Windows and Xbox Series X/S on July 28, 2026, marking Halo's first-ever appearance on PlayStation — strong pre-order window opening now for Xbox/Steam/PSN key sales.

streamer_trends.why_it_matters: MECCHA CHAMELEON is the #9 most-watched Twitch category with hours watched up 27.4% week-over-week and has held the #1 Steam global bestseller spot for two straight weeks — loot.tn already stocks this Steam key and should feature it far more prominently.

Gothic 1 Remake is trending on Twitch with HandOfBlood as its top contributing channel (7% share); loot.tn already lists this as a discounted Steam key, so it can be cross-promoted alongside Meccha Chameleon.

Kai Cenat returned to livestreaming July 6 after a months-long hiatus, now simulcasting on both Twitch and YouTube — his massive audience typically drives spikes in whatever game/account he plays (historically GTA Online, Fortnite, CoD), worth monitoring for a same-day key promo.
Top Francophone streamers relevant to Tunisia's audience are actively duo-queuing Valorant, aligning directly with loot.tn's Valorant VP top-up product line.

GTA V remains one of the most-watched games on Twitch largely thanks to its roleplay scene, and with GTA 6 launching in November 2026, franchise interest is only climbing — supports continued promotion of loot.tn's GTA V Enhanced key and the GTA VI pre-order listings.

recommendations.action: Launch a 'Dernier Jour' (Last Day) flash banner today for all Steam PC keys, since the Steam Summer Sale officially ends July 9.
recommendations.reason: This year's Steam Summer Sale runs June 25 - July 9, 2026, creating a hard deadline that can drive same-day urgency purchases on loot.tn's Steam catalog (Gothic 1 Remake, Arc Raiders, GTA V Enhanced, etc.).

recommendations.action: Move MECCHA CHAMELEON from the 'Derniers ajouts' grid into the hero/top-promo carousel with messaging like 'Le jeu le plus regardé sur Twitch en ce moment'.
recommendations.reason: The game has held the #1 Steam global bestseller spot for two straight weeks and ranks among Twitch's top watched categories, so demand is currently peaking and loot.tn already stocks the key.

recommendations.action: Build a GTA VI pre-order landing page/banner reinforcing the confirmed November 19, 2026 release date and Rockstar's summer marketing campaign kickoff, with an installment/reservation option.
recommendations.reason: Rockstar and Take-Two have publicly reconfirmed GTA VI's release date is November 19, 2026, and won't be delayed again, with the promotional campaign for GTA 6 beginning in summer 2026 — hype and search volume are about to surge.

recommendations.action: Create a 'Meccha Chameleon + Gothic 1 Remake' bundle discount, cross-selling two currently-trending Steam keys already in stock.
recommendations.reason: Both titles are simultaneously trending on Twitch with overlapping European streamer audiences, making a bundle a low-effort way to capture demand from both trends at once.

recommendations.action: Add an EA App key listing/promo for EA SPORTS College Football 27 alongside the existing F1 25 EA App key.
recommendations.reason: EA SPORTS College Football 27 launches worldwide on July 9, 2026 and is the first entry in the series available on PC via the EA App — a same-day launch tie-in extends loot.tn's existing EA App key business.

recommendations.action: Run a targeted Valorant VP top-up promo (French-language creative) timed to Gotaga/Squeezie's Valorant duo content.
recommendations.reason: Two of the biggest Francophone streamers relevant to Tunisia's audience are actively playing Valorant together, directly matching loot.tn's Valorant VP Europe product line.

recommendations.action: Monitor Kai Cenat's comeback stream content over the next 1-2 weeks and prepare a rapid-response promo for whatever game/account he plays most (e.g., GTA Online, Fortnite, CoD).
recommendations.reason: Kai Cenat just returned to livestreaming July 6 after a long hiatus with a first-ever Twitch+YouTube simulcast, and his streams historically cause short-term spikes in whatever title he plays.

recommendations.action: Add a Halo: Campaign Evolved pre-order listing (Xbox/Steam/PS5 key) ahead of its July 28 launch.
recommendations.reason: Halo: Campaign Evolved is set to be released for PlayStation 5, Windows and Xbox Series X/S on July 28, 2026, marking the franchise's console debut on PlayStation and generating strong pre-order interest across all three platforms loot.tn already serves.

site_notes: Homepage already smartly stocks several currently-trending titles (Meccha Chameleon, Gothic 1 Remake, Arc Raiders, EA FC 26, GTA VI pre-orders) but they're buried in generic 'Derniers ajouts'/'Top Promos' grids rather than surfaced as time-sensitive trending picks; adding urgency badges ('Tendance Twitch', 'Dernier jour promo Steam', 'Sortie aujourd'hui') to the hero carousel would better convert on today's news cycle.
